name: DNS Tunneling Detection & Response
description: Detects and responds to DNS tunneling activity where attackers encode data within DNS queries to exfiltrate information or establish covert communication channels. Riggs AI analyzes DNS query patterns for entropy anomalies, unusual TXT/NULL record volumes, and known tunneling tool signatures. Confirmed tunneling triggers domain blocking on the DNS resolver, source host isolation via EDR, and SOC notification. Inconclusive alerts are flagged for manual review.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Infoblox
required_integrations.reason: Block malicious domains on the DNS resolver and query DNS logs for tunneling indicators

required_integrations.name: CrowdStrike Falcon
required_integrations.reason: Isolate the source host generating DNS tunneling traffic

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify the SOC team of confirmed DNS tunneling activity

config.description: Triggers when DNS monitoring detects high-entropy queries, excessive TXT/NULL record lookups, or patterns matching known DNS tunneling tools

config.additional_instructions: Focus on DNS query entropy, subdomain length patterns, TXT/NULL record frequency, query volume per domain, and known tunneling tool signatures (iodine, dnscat2, dns2tcp). Determine if this is data exfiltration or C2 over DNS.
config.description: AI-powered analysis of DNS query patterns to identify tunneling characteristics including entropy scoring, record type abuse, and tool fingerprinting
Routes based on whether Riggs AI confirmed DNS tunneling activity versus legitimate high-volume DNS usage

parameters.comment: DNS tunneling domain blocked — Tool: {{analyze_1.tunneling_tool}}, Alert: {{trigger_1.alert.alert_id}}

config.description: Adds the tunneling domain to the DNS resolver blacklist to immediately stop data exfiltration or covert communication

parameters.comment: Isolated due to confirmed DNS tunneling — Domain: {{trigger_1.alert.destination_domain}}, Alert: {{trigger_1.alert.alert_id}}

config.description: Network-isolates the source host via CrowdStrike to prevent further data exfiltration through the DNS tunnel
Adds the confirmed tunneling domain to the EDL blocklist for organization-wide DNS and firewall blocking
Sends critical notification to the SOC Slack channel with DNS tunneling details and containment actions

parameters.note: DNS anomaly analyzed by Riggs AI — Verdict: {{analyze_1.verdict}}. Tunneling not confirmed but patterns warrant manual review. Query entropy and volume metrics attached.

config.description: Flags the alert for manual SOC analyst review when DNS tunneling is not definitively confirmed but anomalous patterns exist
DNS tunneling detection and response workflow complete
